# Copilot Instructions

Read `.claude/CLAUDE.md` for all project rules, handoff notes, and protocols.
Read `controller-note/` for cross-agent shift notes and pings.

## Before starting work

1. Check `controller-note/.ping` vs `.last-read` -- if `.ping` is newer, read upnotes first
2. Read the **Handoff Notes** section in `.claude/CLAUDE.md`
3. Tag all upnote entries with `@copilot`

## On exit

1. Append session summary to `controller-note/ProjectBook-Planner-upnote.md`
2. Update **Handoff Notes** in `.claude/CLAUDE.md`
3. Touch `.ping` and `.last-read` in `controller-note/`
